reviews.review_description: This game is a really good and cool game i always imagined making a robot fan game like this but I don’t need that anymore this is a really great game! I like battle royals cause it’s a good easy and hardcore game mode and Minecraft although can be hard at first and still in the works is also a cool edition the cosmetics are cool the mechanics work perfectly fine with me I met the people of the game and it gave me lots of cool people to know I really hope this game gets more popular and realistic in the futures and that’s what I think about the game it’s just really good with great potential I will continue to get more people into the game 5 STARS!

the owner is a p3d0 and he grooms little kids by giving them admin and mod. he powers trips and bans people for making another game for fun. he thinks his janky game will take over the meta store one day.  was able to tell him to keep dreaming p3d0.

Great game, the owners and developers are really active so the game is always getting better. They have free cosmetics, cool bundles, and multiple game modes. My favorite is the building mode, it’s so fun to build things but they also have battle royal and 2 different parkour courses that give u coins when completing so every time u complete one u get coins, and there’s more game modes to come. The owners, staffs, and community are very friendly as well. All around good game.

This became my new favorite game someone came up to me in a dif game and I’m glad that they did. I was hesitant about joining it after I downloaded it and I’m glad I decided to get on. The owner is really kind and just a good guy in general.

There's so much stuff i can say about this game and it's all great, RoboRoyale is the BEST, the community is very kind and staff too and there so much stuff you can do in this game, i can't wait for more updates!, DOWNLOAD THIS GAME NOWWWWW

The game is really fun to play with friends!
The community is great!
Fun game modes to play!
Considering the game has 1 great coder, the updates are still 🔥!
I highly recommend this game!
This game is really fun. I would recommend it too. Also the rumors about the owner is false so don't believe them. And it's a good game with a good community
Game is awesome robo is not a p3do he’s the nicest person ever made the greatest game I’ve ever played and the community is amazing
This game is amazing. For how ne this gam is it I very good. There are very little bugs for how new it is. Overall this gam is amazing
i love this game everyone is chill owner is chill every good game to hang out
This game is peak af and is lwk Soo fun, definitely recommend downloading!
The game is good especially for early access games. It has PvP, Minecraft and free cosmetics. The moderators, administrators, and owners are very friendly and have a good sense of humor.
The owner is nice
Its peak tuff and creative
The mods are very nice to people and thhe owner is so chill and also when people get banned they get jail cell.
The game is awesome it's growing and it's fun and will continue to be like that love this game!!!!
so good awesome people

I really love to play the Minecraft game mode it has a a lot of different building options really big area to build and have fun with and without your friends there is also a battle royal that is also very fun with friends.
guy came up to me in orion drift to tell me to play this, has some really cool features so far. most of this game is just potential waiting to be used.
Lots of different types of game modes you can play like Minecraft and battle Royal there is also a lot of cosmetics that are free btw😁😁😁
This game is really good I love the features and the play style. The building mode is really fun! And the combat mode too!

reviews.review_title: A really fun and great game
reviews.review_description: So I know the owner good and it’s a fun thing to see people happy in the game playing with their freinds and having fun!
